summary: Frontend testing completed for game configuration refactor. All 8 features verified working correctly: Battle and Adventure game types now have their own specific settings instead of conflicting global sliders.

feature_tests.1_battle_hides_generic_sliders: PASS - When Battle game type selected, Number of Questions and Duration sliders are hidden
feature_tests.2_adventure_hides_generic_sliders: PASS - When Adventure game type selected, generic sliders are hidden
feature_tests.3_quiz_shows_generic_sliders: PASS - When Quiz or Auto-detect selected, generic sliders are visible
feature_tests.4_battle_info_message: PASS - Shows 'Battle settings (rounds, timer, damage) are configured in the preview tab after generating'
feature_tests.5_adventure_info_message: PASS - Shows 'Adventure settings (scenes, questions per scene) are configured in the preview tab after generating'
feature_tests.6_theme_selector_settings_tab: PASS - ThemeSelector shows Settings tab with Battle Rounds (5-25), Time Per Round (15-90s), Damage Per Hit (10-50)
feature_tests.7_theme_selector_summary_box: PASS - Shows Total Questions, Est. Duration, Hits to Win summary
feature_tests.8_adventure_world_selector: PASS - Shows AdventureWorldSelector with 6 worlds, Journey Length (3-7 scenes), Questions Per Scene (1-3)
feature_tests.9_studio_editor_battle_visuals: PASS - StudioEditor Visuals tab shows ThemeSelector with battle config for battle games
feature_tests.10_studio_editor_adventure_visuals: PASS - StudioEditor Visuals tab shows AdventureWorldSelector for adventure games

code_verification.hasGameTypeConfig_variable: VERIFIED - Line 147 in StudioNew.jsx determines if sliders hidden
code_verification.conditional_slider_rendering: VERIFIED - Lines 432-469 in StudioNew.jsx conditionally render sliders
code_verification.battle_config_save: VERIFIED - Lines 269-272 save battle_config to spec (rounds, timer_per_round, damage_per_correct)
code_verification.adventure_config_save: VERIFIED - Lines 278-281 save adventure_config to spec (scene_count, questions_per_scene)
code_verification.StudioEditor_visuals_tab: VERIFIED - Lines 719-757 conditionally show ThemeSelector or AdventureWorldSelector based on game_type

features_verified: Battle game type hides generic Number of Questions and Duration sliders - WORKING
Adventure game type hides generic sliders - WORKING
Quiz and Auto-detect show generic sliders - WORKING
ThemeSelector Settings tab shows rounds (5-25), timer (15-90s), damage (10-50) - WORKING
ThemeSelector displays summary (Total Questions, Est. Duration, Hits to Win) - WORKING
ThemeSelector correctly passes battle_config props - WORKING
AdventureWorldSelector shows scene count (3-7) and questions per scene (1-3) - WORKING
AdventureWorldSelector correctly saves adventure_config to spec - WORKING
StudioEditor Visuals tab shows ThemeSelector for battle games - WORKING
StudioEditor Visuals tab shows AdventureWorldSelector for adventure games - WORKING
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test games during testing: 1 Battle game ('Multiplication Monster Showdown') and 1 Adventure game ('Islands of the Compass Crown')
context_for_next_testing_agent: Game configuration refactor verified. Battle games use ThemeSelector with Settings tab (rounds, timer, damage). Adventure games use AdventureWorldSelector (scenes, questions per scene). Generic sliders only visible for Quiz/Auto-detect game types. StudioEditor Visuals tab dynamically shows appropriate config based on game_type. Test user: test@adventure.com / test123456
